title: Filtering on all boards in a table dashboard
excerpt: I would like to be able to filter on all boards when I use a table dashboard. I think this make sense as the main reason for using dashboards is to get an overview of multiple/all boards whereby the filtering needs to wo…

posts.author: kvittingseerup (Kristoffer Vitting-Seerup)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to filter on all boards when I use a table dashboard. I think this make sense as the main reason for using dashboards is to get an overview of multiple/all boards whereby the filtering needs to work accordingly.
